case_title: WARREN ROBINSON VS. HOME DELIVERY LOGISTICS

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$75.00) SERVED SEP-27-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HOME DELIVERY LOGISTICS
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT HOME DELIVERY LOGISTICS
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,500.00 FILED BY ROBINSON, WARREN AS TO DEFENDANT HOME DELIVERY LOGISTICS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-12-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-12-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO NOV-27-2019 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WARREN ROBINSON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT HOME DELIVERY LOGISTICS IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY MS. ROSE DIRECTOR OF FINANCES AND ADMINISTRATION. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT PRIOR TO THE HEARING. APPEARANCE AT THE NEXT HEARING IS REQUIRED IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE OR THE AGREEMENT IS NOT MET. IF NO APPEARNACE AT THE NOV-27-2019 HEARING THE MATTER WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
